MASTER CALENDAR JURY

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2015 Set For Trial On Jul-18-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Continued To Dec-30-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-21-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CYBERNET ENTERTAINMENT LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled in its entirety. The demurrer is overruled as to causes of action 1 and 2. Defendant is raising a strawman argument that ignores the allegations of the complaint. Paragraphs 13-14 of the Complaint show that there were multiple incidents of harassment. Members of the public groped and rubbed up against plaintiff on several occasions throughout the shoot. Plaintiff also alleges sufficient facts regarding knowledge. Paragraphs 8-11 allege facts regarding the nature of the shoot at the Folsom Street Fair and how plaintiff expressed her safety concerns to defendant prior to the shoot. The demurrer is overruled as to the remaining causes of action. Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts to support those claims. Plaintiff's cause of action under Labor Code sec. 1102.5(b) is viable because the Legislature amended that statute to apply to internal employee complaints. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
